name: Product Affordability
examples: Love these Air Pods. Great price.

name: Battery Life
examples: The battery life is so long.

name: Perfect Fit
examples: Fits perfect in my pocket to charge.

name: Durability Over Time
description: Product has lasted for a year
examples: These has lasted me a year.

name: Wear Resistance
description: Dropped several times but still work
examples: Dropped them a few times but they still work.

name: Noise Cancellation
examples: I love everything about the AirPods pro. Living in a noisy city like New York they make everything just that much better.

name: Product Quality
description: The overall quality and potential issues with the product.
examples: Very troubling as this was a Christmas gift. The box arrived unsealed which I thought was peculiar. When my husband went to pair them with his phone they had already been paired with someone else’s account. They are definitely not new, and possibly counterfeit.

name: Sound Quality
description: The responsiveness and performance of the sound.
examples: I still appreciate my original AirPods for quiet environments, it has a different bass response than the pros — principally due to the isolation for noise cancellation.

name: Replacements Do Not Work
description: The product replacements do not function correctly.
examples: Had to order 2 replacements and they still don't work.

name: Better Alternative Than Apple
description: A better alternative to buying from Apple.
examples: Just buy from Apple or don't get them they are a waste of money.

name: Parts Are Stolen
description: Parts are stolen from the product.
examples: But someone stole mines out my car
